TileMutatorDef.label: ash deposit
TileMutatorDef.description: A small deposit of ash, allowing the natural growth of ashland native plants.

TileMutatorDef.label: blighted ash deposit
TileMutatorDef.description: A small deposit of blighted ash, allowing the natural growth of ashland native plants.

TileMutatorDef.label: rich ash deposit
TileMutatorDef.description: A small deposit of rich ash, allowing the natural growth of ashland native plants.

TileMutatorDef.label: volcanic ash deposit
TileMutatorDef.description: A small deposit of volcanic ash, allowing the natural growth of ashland native plants.
